active_status_policy.rule_zh: active 首頁工程資料必須不重複、現況有效、來源可回查；已完工或啟用超過一個月、取消、停辦、停止推動、來源失效或無法查證者不得計入首頁現況統計。
active_status_policy.rule_en: Active homepage records must be non-duplicate, current, and traceable. Projects completed or opened for more than one month, cancelled, paused, no longer valid, or unverified must stay outside the active count.

home_loading_policy.rule_zh: 首頁只載入首屏必要批次；其餘資料保留在延後批次，避免手機一次載入過量資料。即使 active 逐步補到 300 件，也不得一次渲染 300 張完整卡片。
home_loading_policy.rule_en: The home page loads only the first essential batches; the remaining records stay in deferred batches to keep mobile browsing fast. Even when active records grow to 300, the page must not render 300 full cards at once.
